title: Rake: The Arrival
description: How long can you stay in the forest from the Rake?
body:
The Rake: The Arrival mod brings the terrifying Rake to your Minecraft world, a creature that only emerges at night. It lurks in the forests, stalking its prey in silence while you hear creepy noises all around you. If you're lucky, you might catch a glimpse of it darting between the trees. Once you notice the Rake watching or following you, things take a dangerous turn. If you spot him, he will either attack or retreat into the darkness. As he takes damage, the Rake becomes even more powerful and relentless. Brace yourself for the Rake to jumpscares you. Abandoned campsites scattered throughout the forest hold a chilling note, hinting at the creature. Can you make it through the night without becoming his next victim?

## **Updates continue on Curseforge** ##

- A mod made by Zcoper
- Mod created with MCreator!
- Requires Geckolib

● Visit my Discord Server!
[https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ](https://discord.gg/akP56NtmVQ)



● Important FaQ

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>



► [OLD] What is my console spaming?

Most mobs use special spawning conditions, which means that these mobs can only appear under certain conditions. If the spawning conditions work, this spam is created in the console.

► [OLD] Why can't I summon a mob?

Spawning Conditions determine which conditions must be met in order to spawn certain mobs. Some mobs only spawn above Y level 60. Some below. Most mobs can only spawn in the overworld than in other dimensions.

► Why are features missing in different versions?

It is recommended to play the newest versions of higher minecraft versions.

Not all features of MCreator available or the same in different versions.
For example: Version 1.19.2 doesn't have the feature of shield, better structure generation or custom villagers, but Version 1.20.1 does have them.

► How to disable the Rake Jumpscare?

Rake Jumpscare can be switched off using the gamerule "allowRakeJumpscare" if it is set to false. 


</details>



![Rake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c2143fa819ba3fce41f5450bc711fe1b5d2d9cb1.png)

The Rake spawns at night in forests. It stalks players or silently follows them while keeping its distance. If a player makes direct eye contact, the Rake may flee, digging into the ground after a few seconds but may spawn from the ground under a player again to attack. However, it can also become aggressive upon eye contact. When the Rake screams, the surroundings briefly darken, and the creature vanishes, only to reappear nearby moments later to launch an attack. The Rake can climb and destroy blocks. Its attacks have a 20% chance to inflict the Bleeding effect, causing the player to take increased damage. If the Rake's health drops below 50, it enters Rage Mode, gaining surrounding particles, Resistance II, and Strength III. In this phase, the Rake becomes far more dangerous but has a very low chance of fleeing. During the Day, it disappears. If defeated, it may drop a Garden Rake, a joke item that functions like a hoe.

 

- Config File not inculed.
- You are all allowed to use this mod in your modpacks!
- Do not port my mods without permission!
